results.description: TO OBTAIN ONE (1) TRUCKABLE WORKBOAT WITH AN OPTION FOR A SECOND BOAT TO INCLUDE DELIVERY.  THE VESSEL IS TO BE APPROXIMATELY 62 FEET LONG AND APPROXIMATELY 25 FEET WIDE. THE CONTRACT INCLUDES ONE (1) OPTION FOR A SECOND WORKBOAT.

THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IT SO CHANGE OUT SECTIONS "C"&"H" TO MATCH THE AGREED UPON CHANGES AS SPECIFIED IN AMENDMENT 0003 TO THE SOLICITATION.  THESE CHANGES WERE INADVERTENTLY LEFT OUT OF THE CONTRACT WHEN AWARDED.  ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

THIS MODIFICATION SERVES AS THE OFFICIAL NOTICE TO PROCEED (NTP) FOR MDC PROJECT: #455335, TRUCKABLE WORKBOAT PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE START DATE: 21 OCTOBER 2016 PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE END DATE: 19 JANUARY 2017 TOTAL PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE DAYS: 90 DAYS ADDITIONAL CHANGES:  -H02:  DELETE SUBMITTAL ITEM "HVAC....C685".   -SECTION C410.E  THE TOWKNEES ARE NOT REQUIRED TO BE REMOVABLE.   ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE THE CONTRACTOR WITH A NOTICE TO PROCEED (NTP) ON CLINS 0002&0003.
